process.commandLine: B=/mnt/masktest; if cat "$B/visible.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q VISIBLE_SECRET; then echo VISIBLE_OK; else echo VISIBLE_MISSING; fi; if cat "$B/secret_file.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q FILE_SECRET; then echo FILE_LEAK; else echo FILE_MASKED_OK; fi; if [ -d "$B/secret_file.txt" ]; then echo FILE_IS_DIR_BUG; else echo FILE_NOT_DIR_OK; fi; if ls "$B/secret_dir" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo DIR_LEAK; else echo DIR_MASKED_OK; fi
